events.title: US Forces Strike Iranian Command Centers and Air Defense Sites
events.desc: The U.S. military announced the completion of its latest wave of strikes on Iran, targeting command centers, air defense sites, missile and drone capabilities, and coastal surveillance facilities, including in Bandar Abbas. This action follows a week-long escalation between the two nations.

events.title: US Strikes Oil Tanker as it Enforces New Iran Blockade
events.desc: The US military targeted an unladen oil tanker with missiles, stating it was heading towards the key Iranian oil terminal on Kharg Island. This action occurred as the US military carried out further strikes on Iran.

events.title: Iran Asks Houthis to Close Red Sea Route if US Strikes Power Infrastructure
events.desc: Iran has reportedly instructed its Houthi allies in Yemen to prepare to close the Red Sea oil route should the United States attack Iranian power infrastructure. This move poses a significant threat to global energy supplies.

events.title: Syria Seizes Arms Shipment Destined for Hezbollah
events.desc: Syrian authorities intercepted an arms shipment originating from Iraq and intended for the militant group Hezbollah. This operation is part of a broader effort to curb illicit arms smuggling through Syrian territory.

events.title: Escalating Israeli Strikes Kill Five in Gaza
events.desc: At least five Palestinians were killed in Gaza due to Israeli strikes, including an airstrike in the Tuffah neighborhood and tank shelling in eastern Gaza City. A research group reported a surge in Israeli attacks to levels not seen since the October truce.

events.title: Pakistan Concerned About Being Drawn into US-Iran Conflict
events.desc: Recent Houthi attacks on Saudi Arabia have frustrated Pakistan and raise concerns that Islamabad could be drawn into the broader US-Iran conflict, potentially complicating its role as a mediator.

events.title: Iran and US Exchange Intensified Fire, Threatening Truce
events.desc: Iran and the United States engaged in intensified exchanges of fire, nearly collapsing the previous month's truce. The US launched multiple waves of air strikes on southern Iran, while Iran retaliated against US allies.

events.title: Fewer Vessels Traverse Strait of Hormuz Amid US Blockade and Strikes
events.desc: Following the US reimposition of its naval blockade on Iranian ports and escalating strikes, vessel traffic through the Strait of Hormuz significantly decreased, with no VLCC or LNG tankers observed passing on Wednesday.

events.title: US House Defeats Bid to Cut Off Aid to Israel
events.desc: The US House of Representatives voted against an amendment to halt aid to Israel, despite significant support from nearly half of the Democratic members. This vote highlights a growing divide within the Democratic party regarding Israel's actions in Gaza.

events.title: Iran Targets Military Bases as US Launches Wave of Strikes
events.desc: Explosions were reported across Iran overnight following US strikes, with neighbouring Gulf states also reporting attacks. This exchange of fire marks a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict.

events.title: US Strikes Iran and Teheran Hits Back at US Allies
events.desc: The United States and Iran engaged in retaliatory strikes, with the US targeting Iran and Iran striking US allies in the Gulf. This conflict is centered around the vital Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Houthi Missiles Target Saudi Arabia After Strikes on Sanaa
events.desc: Yemen's Houthi rebels launched missiles at Saudi Arabia, responding to strikes on Sanaa airport. The Houthis blamed Saudi Arabia for the attack in Yemen's capital and retaliated by targeting Abha airport.

events.title: US and Iran Trade Fire as Tensions Rise Over Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: Tensions escalated as the US and Iran exchanged fire. Iran claimed to have struck US military assets in Kuwait, Jordan, Bahrain, and Oman shortly after the latest US attacks.

events.title: Israeli Strike on Gaza Police Post Kills Seven
events.desc: An Israeli strike on a police post in northern Gaza resulted in the deaths of seven individuals, including a senior officer in the Hamas-run police force. The Israeli military stated that the targets were 'terrorists'.

events.title: UAE Condemns Iran's 'Brazen' Tanker Attack Amid Fresh US Strikes
events.desc: The UAE condemned Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers as the US conducted its third consecutive night of strikes against Iran. President Trump also announced a 20% charge as part of a new blockade on the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Data Breach Reportedly Targets India's Kudankulam Nuclear Power Plant
events.desc: Purported blueprints of sections of India's largest nuclear power plant, Kudankulam, have allegedly been exposed by the World Leaks ransomware group, according to Reuters.

events.title: AI Model's Cyber Potential Leads to Government Intervention
events.desc: The U.S. government intervened and forced Anthropic to take down its AI model Mythos and its safeguarded form, Fable, due to concerns over their cyber potential. The company disputed the action, citing a narrow trigger.
